_comment: Golden-canvas conformance corpus (Keystone E0.3 + E2.2). Each entry declares the expected validator + validate_suite outcome. test_fixtures.py checks per-level validity + degradation; test_conformance.py checks validate_suite (level_reached + ok).

fixtures.note: Minimal JSON Canvas 1.0 — required fields + explicit toEnd:arrow only. Reaches Extended vacuously.
Core + styleAttributes (within enums) + isStartNode + a group.
Extended + populated _reserved + _lattice_meta. Also the degradation case (strip -> extended-valid, D-1).
Negative: directed edge omits toEnd:arrow (C-4). Fails Core, so reaches no level.
Boundary: a valid Core canvas whose styleAttributes.shape ('hexagon') is outside the enum -> Extended (E-2) fails. Reaches Core only.
Boundary: Extended-valid but _reserved.conformance_level is 'core' not 'adna_native' (A-2) -> aDNA-Native fails. Reaches Extended.

Anchor layer (B1, spec_panel_link_semantics §5.3/§6): a caption with qualities.ref -> fig1 (resolves), a panel_link.anchors registry (resolves), and well-formed naming_convention + orphan_detector. Valid aDNA-Native.
Negative (B1): caption qualities.ref -> 'fig_missing' is an orphaned anchor (A-5). Extended-valid, aDNA-Native fails. Reaches Extended.
